hooks.command: B=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo '?'); M=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); C=$(sudo docker inspect --format='{{.State.Status}}' daylight-station 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown'); BP=$(ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep -q ':3112' && echo 'UP' || echo 'DOWN'); AP=$(ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep -q ':3111' && echo 'UP' || echo 'DOWN'); jq -n --arg msg "Branch: $B | $M files changed | Container: $C | :3112 $BP :3111 $AP" '{"systemMessage": $msg}'
